items.briefing:
Australian energy provider Origin has suffered a data breach exposing customer data, so if you're an Origin customer, watch for phishing emails or unusual account activity. Separately, new research confirms AI is making ransomware attacks more effective against Australian organisations, and a new malware strain called Dolphin X is using AI to identify high-value targets — meaning attacks are becoming more targeted and harder to spot.

Closer to home, Australia's incoming AML reforms mean organisations must ensure customer data is accurate and compliant. **Practical tip:** If you search for software online, download it only from the official vendor website — fake ads on search engines are currently being used to spread malware.

featured.title: Australian energy provider Origin says data breach exposes client data - BleepingComputer
featured.quote: Major Australian energy provider Origin suffers data breach exposing customer information.
